# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 179.810 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 6.6667
  biquad b0=1.00030613559 b1=-1.99837744782 b2=0.9982097057 a1=-1.99837744782 a2=0.998515841294
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 57.861 Hz Gain -7.755 dB Q 3.3593
  biquad b0=0.999480349923 b1=-1.99822560484 b2=0.99875958375 a1=-1.99822560484 a2=0.998239933673
Filter 3: ON PK Fc 106.934 Hz Gain +2.707 dB Q 4.1203
  biquad b0=1.00026558094 b1=-1.99849861663 b2=0.998281982956 a1=-1.99849861663 a2=0.998547563892

  biquad b0=0.99978131313 b1=-1.99875544843 b2=0.999002430997 a1=-1.99875544843 a2=0.998783744126

  biquad b0=1.00013393633 b1=-1.99908083792 b2=0.998956457259 a1=-1.99908083792 a2=0.999090393593
